org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.readers

Class AbstractGMLReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorReader
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLToolReader
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.readers.AbstractGMLReader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GMLConstants, NetEditorReader
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    GMLReader1, GMLReader2

    public abstract class AbstractGMLReader
extends AbstractXMLToolReader
implements GMLConstants
    This class permits to read the graph-model into the GML format.

    Graph Modelling Language (GML) is a hierarchical ASCII-based file format for describing graphs. It has been also named Graph Meta Language.

    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Graph_Modelling_Language"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • createGMLReader

        public static AbstractGMLReader createGMLReader(String version)

        the reader.

        public static Long parseIntNoFail(String s)
        Parse an integer value but do not fail if s does not represent an integer value.
        Parameters:

        Returns:
        the integer value or null if s does not represent an integer value.

        s -
        Returns:
        the floating-point value or null if s does not represent a floating-point value.

        resourceRepository - is the repository of the resources from which they could be extracted.

        Throws:

      • extractValueFromTag

        protected static <T> T extractValueFromTag(Element parent,
                        String child,
                        Class<T> type,
                        ResourceRepository resourceRepository)
                                throws IOException
        Extract a value from a XML representation of the GML content.
        Parameters:
        parent - is the XML element (the parent) from which the data must be extracted.
        child - is the name of the data to extract.
        type - is the expected type of the data.
        resourceRepository - is the repository of the resources from which they could be extracted.
        Returns:
        the data.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • extractValueFromTag

        protected static <T> T extractValueFromTag(Element elementN,
                        Class<T> vtype,
                        ResourceRepository resourceRepository)
                                throws IOException
        Extract a value from a XML representation of the GML content.
        Parameters:
        elementN - is the XML element (the XML node itself) from which the data must be extracted.
        vtype - is the expected type of the data.
        resourceRepository - is the repository of the resources from which they could be extracted.
        Returns:
        the data.
        Throws:
        IOException

        Replies the type of the last read content by this reader.

      • read

        public final <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> G read(Class<G> type,
                                File inputFile,
                                Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
                                    throws IOException
        Description copied from interface: NetEditorReader
        Read the specified input stream as a XML file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
        Specified by:
        read in interface NetEditorReader
        Type Parameters:
        G - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        Parameters:
        type - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        inputFile - is the file to read.
        figures - is the collection of figures that were read from the input stream, from the front to the background.
        Returns:
        the graph read from the input stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

                                InputStream is,

      • readGraph

        public abstract <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> G readGraph(Class<G> type,
                                     Element gmlRoot,
                                     Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures,
                                     Progression progression)
                                            throws IOException
        Read the graph from the XML representation of the GML content.
        Parameters:
        type - is the type of the graph to read.
        gmlRoot - is the XML representation of the GML content.
        figures - are the figures extracted from the file from the front to the background.
        progression - is the progression indicator that will be used.
        Returns:
        the graph.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • extractType

        protected String extractType(Element node)
                      throws IOException
        Description copied from class: AbstractXMLToolReader
        Extract the type of the specified node as a string.
        Specified by:
        extractType in class AbstractXMLToolReader
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to explore
        Returns:
        the type of the node, never null.
        Throws:
        IOException
